desc: Spec: merge(g1, g2, connections) combines DAGs at reconcile() join points — init/term unification strategy
task: Create design document explaining merge() function: combining two DAGs at join points

keyFiles.reason: Merge test cases show expected behavior
Precursor: reconcile() identifies gaps that merge() will close

pattern: Design document: Purpose → Problem → Algorithm → Key decisions → Contracts → Examples → Testing → Impact
acceptance: Document explains why merge is needed (multi-phase projects)
Algorithm section shows merge() steps clearly
Key decisions section covers node ID conflicts, edge semantics, init/term inference
Examples show: two-phase pipeline, multi-connection, node ID conflicts
Testing strategy covers core contracts + boundary cases
Document relates to reconcile() and branch()
notes: merge() unifies two DAGs by adding edges from g1 nodes to g2 nodes. Validation ensures merged DAG is acyclic and contracts satisfied. See tests/adv-merge.test.ts for 6+ test cases.
